who: procurement teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause late fees. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
problem: Missed contract renewals leading to late fees and service interruptions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 procurement teams with demo video
Share insights in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try contract renewal tracking dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Update progress weekly in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing contract data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
